caption: A video sequence features a broadcast for "The Tiger Technicians Hour" dated "June 8th, 2022" featuring Basil Chapman. The scene begins with a graphic overlay for "TFNN EDUCATING INVESTORS" that reads "Live Trading Education Every Market Day Monday-Friday 8:30am to 4pm" and includes an advertisement for Ameritrade stating, "Discover the value of becoming a smarter trader." This graphic transitions to reveal a panel of five men in business-casual attire, including collared shirts and blazers, sitting in a studio setting. As the clip progresses, a red "LIVE" banner appears in the lower left, and a promotional graphic for Direxion featuring the word "BOLD?" is displayed. The screen concludes with contact information that reads "CALL IN LIVE ON-AIR! TOLL FREE 877-927-6648 INTERNATIONALLY 727-873-7618," while the caption "Basil Chapman The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022" remains constant at the bottom.
